output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream.put(&packet_id, sizeof(packet_id));
        hexi::put_prefixed(stream, username);
        hexi::put_prefixed(stream, scores.size());
        for (const auto& score : scores) {
            stream.put(&score, sizeof(score));
        }
        stream << hexi::null_terminated(metadata);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_packet(const NetworkPacket& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer;
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);
    packet.serialise(stream);
    return { buffer.read_ptr(), buffer.size() };
}
```</answer>

using namespace hexi;

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);

    NetworkPacket packet;

    // Read packet_id
    uint32_t packet_id = 0;
    adaptor.get(&packet_id, sizeof(packet_id));
    packet.packet_id = endian::le_to_native(packet_id);

    // Read username with 4-byte prefix
    uint32_t username_len = 0;
    adaptor.get(&username_len, sizeof(username_len));
    username_len = endian::le_to_native(username_len);

    if (adaptor.size() < username_len) {
        HEXI_THROW(buffer_underrun(free(), username_len, "Username"));
    }

    packet.username.resize_and_overwrite(username_len, [&](char* strbuf, std::size_t size) {
        adaptor.get(strbuf, size);
        return size;
    });

    // Read score count
    uint32_t score_count = 0;
    adaptor.get(&score_count, sizeof(score_count));
    score_count = endian::le_to_native(score_count);

    // Read scores using read_container
    packet.scores.resize_and_overwrite(score_count, [&](char* data, std::size_t size) {
        if (adaptor.size() < size) {
            HEXI_THROW(buffer_underrun(adaptor.size(), size, "Scores"));
        }
        adaptor.get(data, size);
        return size;
    });

    // Read metadata as null terminated
    auto pos = adaptor.find_first_of(std::byte{0});
    if (pos == adaptor.npos) {
        packet.metadata = "";
    } else {
        packet.metadata.resize_and_overwrite(pos, [&](char* strbuf, std::size_t size) {
            adaptor.get(strbuf, pos);
            return size;
        });
        // Skip null terminator
        adaptor.skip(1);
    }

    // Skip padding
    const auto min_req_size = 4 + 4 + username_len + 4 + score_count * 4 + (pos + 1); // include null terminator
    if (buffer.size() > min_req_size) {
        adaptor.skip(buffer.size() - min_req_size);
    }

    return packet;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <ranges>
#include <span>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor buf(buffer);

    NetworkPacket packet;

    // Read packet ID (4 bytes)
    uint32_t packet_id = 0;
    buf.get(&packet_id, sizeof(packet_id));
    packet.packet_id = hexi::endian::le_to_native(packet_id);

    // Read username with 4-byte prefix
    uint32_t username_len = 0;
    buf.get(&username_len, sizeof(username_len));
    username_len = hexi::endian::le_to_native(username_len);

    if (buf.size() < username_len) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::buffer_underrun(buf.size(), username_len, "Username"));
    }

    packet.username.resize_and_overwrite(username_len, [&](char* strbuf, std::size_t size) {
        buf.get(strbuf, size);
        return size;
    });

    // Read score count (4 bytes)
    uint32_t score_count = 0;
    buf.get(&score_count, sizeof(score_count));
    score_count = hexi::endian::le_to_native(score_count);

    // Read scores using read_container
    packet.scores.resize_and_overwrite(score_count, [&](char* data, std::size_t size) {
        if (buf.size() < size) {
            HEXI_THROW(hexi::buffer_underrun(buf.size(), size, "Scores"));
        }
        buf.get(data, size);
        return size;
    });

    // Read metadata as null-terminated string
    auto pos = buf.find_first_of(std::byte{0});
    if (pos != buf.npos) {
        packet.metadata.resize_and_overwrite(pos, [&](char* strbuf, std::size_t size) {
            buf.get(strbuf, pos);
            return size;
        });
        // Skip null terminator
        buf.skip(1);
    }

    // Skip padding
    const auto min_req_size = 4 + 4 + username_len + 4 + (score_count * 4) + (pos + 1);
    if (buffer.size() > min_req_size) {
        buf.skip(buffer.size() - min_req_size);
    }

    return packet;
}

struct PacketInfo {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string_view username;
};

PacketInfo extract_packet_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    PacketInfo info;

    // Read packet ID (4 bytes)
    info.packet_id = 0;
    hexi::endian::le_to_native(&info.packet_id, adaptor.data() + 0, sizeof(info.packet_id));

    // Read username with 4-byte prefix
    const auto username_prefix = adaptor.data() + 4;
    uint32_t username_len = 0;
    hexi::endian::le_to_native(&username_len, username_prefix, sizeof(username_len));

    // Create string_view for username data (offset 8)
    info.username = { reinterpret_cast<const char*>(adaptor.data() + 8), username_len };

    // Skip scores: read count and skip data
    const auto score_count_offset = 8 + username_len;
    uint32_t score_count = 0;
    hexi::endian::le_to_native(&score_count, adaptor.data() + score_count_offset, sizeof(score_count));
    const auto scores_size = score_count * sizeof(uint32_t);
    adaptor.skip(sizeof(score_count) + scores_size);

    return info;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct MessageHeader {
    uint16_t message_type;
    uint32_t body_length;
    uint32_t footer;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    assert(buffer.size() >= (sizeof(uint16_t) + sizeof(uint32_t) + sizeof(uint32_t)));
    MessageHeader header{};
    hexi::stream_read stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());

    stream.get(&header.message_type, sizeof(header.message_type));
    stream.get(&header.body_length, sizeof(header.body_length));
    stream.skip(header.body_length);
    stream.get(&header.footer, sizeof(header.footer));

    return header;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>

bool write_data_with_check(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint32_t>& items) {

        return false;
    }
    
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> buffer_adaptor(buffer);

    stream.put(&header, sizeof(header));
    stream.put_container(items);
    
    return true;
}

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <concepts>
#include <span>
#include <cassert>
#include <cstddef>
#include <cstring>

struct PacketHeader {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
    uint16_t flags;
};

constexpr auto read_header_with_span(const std::span<const char> buffer) -> PacketHeader {
    const auto min_req_size = sizeof(PacketHeader);
    if(buffer.size() < min_req_size) [[unlikely]] {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer underrun: %zu byte read requested, buffer contains %zu bytes", min_req_size, buffer.size()));
    }

    hexi::buffer_adaptor< const char* > read_adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    hexi::binary_stream stream(read_adaptor);

    PacketHeader header{};
    stream >> header.magic >> header.version >> header.flags;

    // Validate that exactly the correct number of bytes were consumed
    if(stream.total_read() != min_req_size) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Unexpected stream state after reading header"));
    }

    // Convert endianness if needed
    header.magic = hexi::endian::le_to_native(header.magic);
    header.version = hexi::endian::le_to_native(header.version);
    header.flags = hexi::endian::le_to_native(header.flags);

    return header;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct UserData {
    uint32_t user_id;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        adaptor(user_id, name);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_serialise_packet(uint32_t header, const UserData& data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;

    // Write the header in little-endian
    uint32_t swapped_header = hexi::endian::native_to_little(header);
    buffer.resize(4);
    memcpy(buffer.data(), &swapped_header, 4);

    // Serialise the UserData
    hexi::stream_write stream(&buffer);
    data.serialise(stream);

    return buffer;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <concepts>
#include <span>
#include <string_view>
#include <type_traits>
#include <utility>
#include <cassert>
#include <cstddef>
#include <cstring>

struct MessagePacket {
    uint32_t header;
    std::string_view message;
};

MessagePacket read_header_and_message(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    using namespace hexi;

    if(buffer.size() < 4) {
        HEXI_THROW(buffer_underrun(buffer.size(), 4));
    }

    uint32_t header = 0;
    buffer.copy(&header, sizeof(header));
    header = endian::le_to_native(header);

    const auto data = buffer.data() + 4;
    const auto len = buffer.size() - 4;
    auto pos = len;

    while(pos > 0 && data[pos - 1] != 0) {
        --pos;
    }

    return { header, std::string_view { reinterpret_cast<const char*>(data), pos } };
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size>
void write_to_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    char header_buf[4];
    memcpy(header_buf, &header, sizeof(header));
    buffer.write(header_buf, sizeof(header_buf));
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

template<size_t block_size>
struct BufferData {
    uint32_t header;
    std::vector<uint8_t> data;
};

BufferData<> read_from_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<1024>& buffer, size_t data_length) {
    BufferData<> result;
    char header_buf[4];
    buffer.read(header_buf, sizeof(header_buf));
    memcpy(&result.header, header_buf, sizeof(result.header));
    result.data.resize(data_length);
    buffer.read(result.data.data(), result.data.size());
    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> peek_data_from_buffer(const hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_peek) {
    const auto data = buffer.read_ptr();
    const auto read_size = buffer.size();
    
    // Ensure we don't read beyond the available data
    const size_t read_limit = read_size < bytes_to_peek ? read_size : bytes_to_peek;
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(read_limit);
    
    // Copy the data without advancing the read cursor
    memcpy(destination.data(), data, read_limit);
    return destination;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <bit>

template<typename T>
void convert_to_big_endian_inplace(T& value) {
    value = hexi::endian::native_to_big(value);
}

template<typename T>
void convert_to_little_endian_inplace(T& value) {
    value = hexi::endian::native_to_little(value);
}

void convert_endianness_inplace(T& value) {
    value = hexi::endian::convert(from, to, value);

```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    const auto read_ptr = storage.read_ptr();
    const auto read_offset = storage.read_offset();
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_preview);
    memcpy(destination.data(), read_ptr + read_offset, bytes_to_preview);
    return destination;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferStatus {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferStatus<> check_buffer_status(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<1024>& storage) {
    BufferStatus<> status;
    status.readable_size = storage.write_offset() - storage.read_offset();
    status.free_space = storage.free();
    return status;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void reset_buffer(hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    storage.reset();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>

std::vector<uint8_t> read_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    hexi::file_buffer<hexi::buffer_read> buffer(file_path.string().c_str());
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_read);
    buffer.read(destination.data(), bytes_to_read);
    return destination;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> preview_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    hexi::file_buffer<hexi::buffer_read> buffer(file_path.string().c_str());
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_preview);
    buffer.copy(destination.data(), bytes_to_preview);
    return destination;
}

void write_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    hexi::file_buffer<hexi::buffer_write> buffer(file_path.string().c_str());
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

size_t get_file_size(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer<hexi::buffer_read> buffer(file_path.string().c_str());
    return buffer.size();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>

}

    return buffer.write_ptr();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstring> // For memcpy

void write_string_to_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const std::string& str) {
    const auto size = static_cast<std::size_t>(str.size());
    char size_buf[4];
    std::memcpy(size_buf, &size, sizeof(size));
    writer.write(size_buf, sizeof(size_buf));
    writer.write(str.data(), str.size());
}

std::string read_string_from_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    char size_buf[4];
    reader.read(size_buf, sizeof(size_buf));
    const std::size_t size = std::static_cast<std::size_t>(std::atoi(size_buf));
    char* str_data = new char[size];
    reader.read(str_data, size);
    std::string result(str_data, size);
    delete[] str_data;
    return result;
}
```</answer>

void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, uint32_t value, const void* data, std::size_t length) {

    memcpy(int_buf, &value, sizeof(value));

        buffer.capacity() - buffer.size()
    };
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::size_t find_byte_in_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte value) {
    for(std::size_t i = 0; i < buffer.size(); ++i) {
        if(buffer[i] == value) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}

std::size_t find_delimiter_position(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte delimiter) {
    for(std::size_t i = 0; i < buffer.size(); ++i) {
        if(buffer[i] == delimiter) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}

bool check_buffer_contains(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte value) {
    return find_byte_in_buffer(buffer, value) != hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void clear_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    buffer.clear();
}

void conditional_clear_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    buffer.conditional_clear();
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<typename T>
std::size_t encode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, T value) {
    std::size_t written = 0;
    while (value > 0x7f) {
        const std::uint8_t byte = (value & 0x7f) | 0x80;
        writer.put(&byte, 1);
        value >>= 7;
        ++written;
    }
    const std::uint8_t byte = value & 0x7f;
    writer.put(&byte, 1);
    return ++written;
}

template<typename T>
T decode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    T value { 0 };
    int shift { 0 };
    std::uint8_t byte { 0 };

    do {
        byte = 0; // clear in case an error occurs
        reader.get(&byte, 1);
        value |= (static_cast<T>(byte & 0x7f) << shift);
        shift += 7;
    } while(byte & 0x80);

    return value;
}

template<typename T>
bool encode_decode_roundtrip(T original_value) {
    std::vector<std::uint8_t> buffer(1024);
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    auto& writer = stream.get_writer();
    auto& reader = stream.get_reader();

    const std::size_t written = encode_varint<T>(writer, original_value);
    T decoded_value = decode_varint<T>(reader);

    return decoded_value == original_value;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

void write_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream, const std::string& str) {
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(str);
}

std::string read_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream) {
    std::string_view view;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(view);
    return std::string(view);
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstddef>

using namespace hexi::detail;

bool check_regions_overlap(const void* src, std::size_t src_len, const void* dst, std::size_t dst_len) {
    auto src_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(src);
    auto src_end = src_beg + src_len;
    auto dst_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(dst);
    auto dst_end = dst_beg + dst_len;
    return src_beg < dst_end && dst_beg < src_end;
}

bool safe_memory_copy(void* destination, const void* source, std::size_t length) {
    if (check_regions_overlap(source, length, destination, length)) {
        memmove(destination, source, length);
    } else {
        memcpy(destination, source, length);
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstddef>

struct ExceptionDetails {
    std::size_t read_size;
    std::size_t total_read;
    std::size_t limit_or_size;
    std::string message;
};

ExceptionDetails extract_underrun_info(const hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {
    return {
        e.read_size(), 
        e.total_read(), 
        e.buff_size(), 
        e.what()
    };
}

ExceptionDetails extract_read_limit_info(const hexi::stream_read_limit& e) {
    return {
        e.read_size(), 
        e.total_read(), 
        e.read_limit(), 
        e.what()
    };
}

std::string get_exception_message(const hexi::exception& e) {
    return e.what();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/buffer_sequence.h>
#include <hexi/concepts.h>
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <ranges>
#include <span>
#include <vector>
#include <string>

struct CompactPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::vector<std::string> tags;
    std::string data;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_compact_packet(const CompactPacket& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer;
    
    // Serialize packet_id as 4-byte value
    buffer.write(&packet.packet_id, sizeof(packet.packet_id));
    
    // Serialize tags with prefixed_varint encoding
    hexi::varint_encode_with_prefix(buffer, packet.tags.size(), 1);
    for (const auto& tag : packet.tags) {
        hexi::varint_encode(buffer, tag.size());
        buffer.write(tag.data(), tag.size());
    }
    
    // Serialize data with prefixed_varint encoding
    hexi::varint_encode_with_prefix(buffer, 1, 1); // count is 1
    hexi::varint_encode(buffer, packet.data.size());
    buffer.write(packet.data.data(), packet.data.size());
    
    return buffer.to_vector();
}

CompactPacket deserialize_compact_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    CompactPacket packet{};
    
    // Deserialize packet_id
    adaptor.get(&packet.packet_id, sizeof(packet.packet_id));
    
    // Deserialize tags
    const auto num_tags = hexi::varint_decode_with_prefix<std::size_t>(adaptor, 1);
    packet.tags.resize(num_tags);
    for (auto& tag : packet.tags) {
        const auto tag_len = hexi::varint_decode<std::size_t>(adaptor);
        tag.resize_and_overwrite(tag_len, [&](char* strbuf, std::size_t size) {
            adaptor.get(strbuf, size);
            return size;
        });
    }
    
    // Deserialize data
    const auto num_data = hexi::varint_decode_with_prefix<std::size_t>(adaptor, 1);
    if (num_data != 1) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Invalid data count in compact packet"));
    }
    packet.data.resize_and_overwrite([&](char* strbuf, std::size_t size) {
        const auto data_len = hexi::varint_decode<std::size_t>(strbuf, size);
        adaptor.get(strbuf, data_len);
        return data_len;
    }, packet.data.size());
    
    return packet;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_base.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstddef>

class CustomBuffer : public hexi::pmc::buffer_base {
    std::vector<std::byte> data_;
    
public:
    // Override the virtual methods from buffer_base
    std::size_t size() const override { return data_.size(); }
    [[nodiscard]]
    bool empty() const override { return data_.empty(); }

    // Helper method to add data (for testing)
    void add_data(const void* source, std::size_t length) {
        const std::byte* bytes = static_cast<const std::byte*>(source);
        data_.insert(data_.end(), bytes, bytes + length);
    }
    
    // Helper method to clear data (for testing)
    void clear() {
        data_.clear();
    }
};
```</answer>

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_read_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& input_data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    {
        hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
        if (adaptor.free() < input_data.size()) {
            buffer.resize(input_data.size());
        }
        adaptor.write(input_data.data(), input_data.size());
    }
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    {
        hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor read_adaptor(buffer);
        result.resize(read_adaptor.size());
        read_adaptor.read(result.data(), result.size());
    }
    return result;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_data_without_advancing(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer_data, std::size_t peek_size) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer_data);
    if (adaptor.size() < peek_size) {
        // Assuming valid input as per problem statement
    }
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(peek_size);
    adaptor.copy(result.data(), peek_size);
    adaptor.read(result.data(), peek_size);
    return result;
}
```</answer>

    // Serialize message_id with endianness conversion
    const auto message_id_big = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id);
    stream.put(&message_id_big, sizeof(message_id_big));
    
    // Prepare data_values with endianness conversion
    std::vector<uint16_t> converted_data;
    converted_data.reserve(packet.data_values.size());
    for (const auto& value : packet.data_values) {
        converted_data.push_back(hexi::endian::native_to_big(value));
    }
    stream.write_container(converted_data);
    
    // Serialize checksum with endianness conversion
    const auto checksum_big = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
    stream.put(&checksum_big, sizeof(checksum_big));
    
    return stream.buffer();
}

ProtocolPacket deserialize_protocol_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    ProtocolPacket packet;
    
    // Deserialize message_id
    uint32_t message_id = 0;
    stream.get(&message_id, sizeof(message_id));
    packet.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(message_id);
    
    // Read data_values count
    uint32_t count = 0;
    stream.get(&count, sizeof(count));
    count = hexi::endian::big_to_native(count);
    
    // Deserialize data_values
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values(count);
    stream.read_container(data_values);
    for (auto& value : data_values) {
        value = hexi::endian::big_to_native(value);
    }
    packet.data_values = std::move(data_values);
    
    // Deserialize checksum
    uint32_t checksum = 0;
    stream.get(&checksum, sizeof(checksum));
    packet.checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(checksum);
    
    return packet;
}

struct ProtocolHeader {
    uint32_t message_id;
};

ProtocolHeader extract_protocol_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    if (buffer.size() < sizeof(ProtocolHeader)) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer too small for protocol header"));
    }
    
    uint32_t message_id = 0;
    std::memcpy(&message_id, buffer.data(), sizeof(message_id));
    message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(message_id);
    
    return { .message_id = message_id };
}
